data.title: PMGC Stock Surges After Subsidiary Inks Deal With Yuva Biosciences To Develop AI Led Therapies
data.description: PMGC Holdings is gaining in premarket trading after its subsidiary, Northstrive Biosciences, partnered with Yuva Biosciences to develop AI-powered therapies for cardiometabolic diseases. Yuva's MitoNova platform will identify compounds that support mitochondrial health.

data.title: Walmart's Strong Outlook Driven By 3 Strategic Advantages, Analyst Says
data.description: Walmart's investor day highlighted positive ecommerce growth, with a Buy rating and $106 price target from analyst Kate McShane.

data.title: Crypto Leverage Trading In The US May Become More Accessible: Here's Why
data.description: US investors may soon have access to high-risk perpetual futures contracts as regulatory changes under Trump's administration make way for new markets.

data.title: Nike Stock Tumbles As US-China Trade War Intensifies: What You Need To Know
data.description: Nike Inc (NYSE:NKE) shares are tumbling on Thursday amid rising trade tensions between the United States and China.

data.title: Snowflake Achieves DOD IL5 Authorization: What You Need To Know
data.description: Snowflake Inc (NYSE:SNOW) shares are trading lower, pulling back from a broad market surge on Wednesday that lifted stocks across the board. The company on Thursday announced that it received Department of Defense (DOD) Impact Level 5 (IL5) authorization.
